zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Tudenham Scott於1404年出生在英國諾福爾可守爾達哈姆時，她的父親John De Tudenham30歲，母親Margaret de Harling32歲。她於大約1427年與Sir Edmund Bedingfield在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧可波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年3月15日在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可艾利斯維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Tudenham Scott于1404年出生在英国諾福爾可守爾達哈姆时，她的父亲John De Tudenham30岁，母亲Margaret de Harling32岁。她于大约1427年与Sir Edmund Bedingfield在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧可波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年3月15日在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可艾利斯維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tuddenham
meanings: English: locative name, principally from from East or West Tuddenham (Norfolk), but also from Tuddenham (Suffolk) or Tuddenham Saint Martin (Suffolk).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Tudenham Scott was born in 1404, in Shouldham, Norfolk, England, her father, John De Tudenham, was 30 and her mother, Margaret de Harling, was 32. She married Sir Edmund Bedingfield about 1427, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 March 1475, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Eriswell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Tudenham Scott est née en 1404, à Shouldham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John De Tudenham, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Harling, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Bedingfield environ 1427, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mars 1475, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Eriswell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Tudenham Scott 1404 in Shouldham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Tudenham 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Harling 32. Sie hat um 1427 in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Edmund Bedingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. März 1475 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Oxborough, Norfolk, England und wurde in Eriswell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Tudenham Scott è nata il nel 1404 nel Shouldham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, John De Tudenham, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Harling, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund Bedingfield circa 1427, nel Oxborough, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1475, nel Oxborough, Norfolk, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Eriswell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Tudenham Scottが1404年にイギリスノーフォルクショウルドハムで生まれた時，父John De Tudenhamは30歳，母Margaret de Harlingは32歳であった。約1427年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウでSir Edmund Bedingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年3月15日にイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクエリスウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Tudenham Scott(이)가 1404년 영국 노르폴크 쇼우드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Tudenham(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Harling(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스버루에서 Sir Edmund Bedingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 3월 15일 영국 노르폴크 스버루에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 에리스웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Tudenham Scott nasceu em 1404, em Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Tudenham, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Harling, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund Bedingfield aproximadamente 1427, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de março de 1475, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Eriswell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Tudenham Scott родилась в 1404 г. в местности шоулдхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John De Tudenham было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Harling, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Bedingfield около 1427 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 марта 1475 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности эрисвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Tudenham Scott nació en 1404, en Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Tudenham, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret de Harling, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund Bedingfield aproximadamente 1427, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1475, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Eriswell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
